title: Mass layoffs at Xbox spark reactions from studios and fans
summary: Following the cuts at Xbox, studios like Obsidian and Compulsion Games speak out, while players demand an end to the wave of layoffs and ZeniMax defends the future of The Elder Scrolls Online.

title: Kingdom Hearts prepares a major 'Deep Dive' event at D23 for its 25th anniversary
summary: Disney and Square Enix will celebrate the 25th anniversary of the Kingdom Hearts saga with a special presentation at D23, fueling expectations for a possible Kingdom Hearts 4 announcement.

title: Octopath Traveler comes to Switch 2 with better graphics but no free upgrade
summary: Square Enix announces Octopath Traveler 1 and 2 for Switch 2 with visual and performance improvements, but sparks controversy by not offering a free upgrade for original owners.

title: Games Done Quick cancels its sponsorship with SNK due to its ties to Saudi Arabia
summary: The charitable organization Games Done Quick apologizes and pulls its SNK-sponsored stream following criticism over the studio's relationship with the Saudi government, although it manages to raise $2.4 million.

title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced suffers serious connection issues and Ubisoft removes a controversial phrase
summary: The failed launch of the Black Flag remake is unplayable with servers down despite having an offline mode, while Ubisoft removes from its report the claim that microtransactions make games 'more fun'.

title: Dragon's Dogma 2 corrects its fast travel and seeks to regain player trust
summary: The developers of Dragon's Dogma 2 promise to address the criticism of fast travel with the Dark Arisen DLC, while the publisher speaks out about the future of the saga after the departure of its original director.

title: Black Ops ports for PS4 and PS5 disappoint due to high price and hacker infestation
summary: The ports of Call of Duty: Black Ops 1 and 2 for PlayStation consoles are harshly criticized by critics and users for their minimal technical improvements and the massive presence of cheaters.

title: EA Sports removes microtransactions from College Football 27 after wave of criticism
summary: The developer yields to player pressure and removes the controversial microtransactions from the latest installment of its college football simulator.

title: My Chemical Romance singer causes a viral crossover with Baldur's Gate 3
summary: Gerard Way stops a concert to talk about classic RPGs and confesses that he hasn't played Baldur's Gate 3, sparking a fun wave of comments and involvement from Larian Studios.

title: Analysts forecast a historic drop in console sales in 2026 that not even GTA 6 can prevent
summary: Despite the imminent release of Grand Theft Auto VI at a price of $80, analysts warn that the console market will suffer its worst slump in years, reaching historic lows.

title: Warframe's creative director laments the end of Destiny 2 and warns about executive pressure
summary: The end of the Destiny 2 era provokes reactions in the industry, especially from its direct competitor Warframe, which celebrates its TennoCon and warns of the danger that business decisions pose to game development.

title: Laid-off developers from the failed MindsEye protest against Build A Rocket Boy's management
summary: Former unionized workers of the studio protest against the organization of a playtest for fans, which they consider disrespectful after the massive layoffs at the studio.

title: Persona 3 celebrates its 20th anniversary with a remixed music video and pixel art
summary: Atlus commemorates two decades of the iconic RPG with a special video, while fans debate the best characters from the original game on social media.

title: The legendary Donkey Kong arcade machine will become a $200 Lego set
summary: A leak reveals the next Lego set from Nintendo, a replica of the iconic Donkey Kong arcade machine that would launch at a premium price for collectors.

title: Aerial Knight's MrFreezy announced, a promising puzzle game about a serial killer
summary: The independent studio presents this original action-puzzle game, described as a 'light thriller' with a unique aesthetic, coming soon to PC.

title: A new game will be the spiritual successor to Bully as Rockstar refuses to make a sequel
summary: While Rockstar confirms it has no plans for Bully 2, a studio announces an open-world game set in a school that already has a release date.

title: The launch of Palworld version 1.0 sends its player count skyrocketing to near historic record
summary: Palworld's success continues unabated, surpassing 900,000 concurrent players on Steam and displacing giants like Dota 2 after the launch of its full version.

title: The live-action version of Moana fails miserably at the box office like Snow White
summary: Disney's live-action remake of Moana repeats the disastrous box office performance of the recent Snow White, confirming the public's fatigue with live-action adaptations.

title: League of Legends Classic announces its release date with community-voted patches
summary: Riot Games confirms the return of the classic League of Legends mode and introduces the possibility for players to decide which balance changes are implemented in this nostalgic version.

title: God of War Laufey will be released on disc, hinting at its possible release window
summary: The confirmation of a physical format for Kratos' next adventure allows analysts to speculate that its release date could be more imminent than many expected.
